---
title: "Πίνακας Τριγωνομετρικών Αριθμών"
subtitle: "sin(θ), cos(θ) και tan(θ) για θ = 0° έως 90°"
author: "ΤΑΣΟΣ ΑΡΒΑΝΙΤΗΣ"
date: today
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
lang: el
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

fmt <- if (knitr::is_html_output()) "html" else "latex"

degrees  <- 0:90          # 91 γωνίες
sin_vals <- sin(degrees * pi / 180)
cos_vals <- cos(degrees * pi / 180)
tan_vals <- tan(degrees * pi / 180)

# ── βοηθητικές συναρτήσεις ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

fmt_val <- function(x, limit = 999) {
  if (is.na(x) || abs(x) > limit) "—"
  else formatC(round(x, 4), digits = 4, format = "f")
}

# Κλίμακα χρώματος ανάλογα με απόλυτη τιμή (0→1)
color_scale <- function(x, invert = FALSE) {
  v <- if (invert) 1 - abs(x) else abs(x)
  if      (is.na(x) || abs(x) > 999) "#888888"
  else if (abs(x) < 0.001)            "#888888"
  else if (v < 0.25)                  "#1F4E79"
  else if (v < 0.50)                  "#2E75B6"
  else if (v < 0.75)                  "#7030A0"
  else                                "#C00000"
}

color_tan <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x) || abs(x) > 999) "#888888"
  else if (x < 0)                "#C00000"
  else if (abs(x) > 5)           "#CC6600"
  else if (abs(x) > 1)           "#7030A0"
  else                           "#1F4E79"
}

# Δημιουργία μπλοκ για cbind — ΙΣΟΥ μεγέθους
make_block <- function(degs, svals, cvals, tvals) {
  data.frame(
    deg = cell_spec(paste0(degs,"°"), fmt, bold=TRUE, color="#1F4E79"),
    sin = cell_spec(sapply(svals, fmt_val),
                    fmt, color=sapply(svals, color_scale),
                    bold=abs(svals)>0.99),
    cos = cell_spec(sapply(cvals, fmt_val),
                    fmt, color=sapply(cvals, function(x) color_scale(x, invert=TRUE)),
                    bold=abs(cvals)>0.99),
    tan = cell_spec(sapply(tvals, function(x) fmt_val(x, 999)),
                    fmt, color=sapply(tvals, color_tan),
                    bold=abs(tvals)>5 & abs(tvals)<999),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# 91 γωνίες → 3 μπλοκ 31/31/29 → padding στο τρίτο για ίσο μέγεθος
idx1 <- 1:31          # 0°–30°
idx2 <- 32:62         # 31°–61°
idx3 <- 63:91         # 62°–90°  (29 γωνίες)

b1 <- make_block(degrees[idx1], sin_vals[idx1], cos_vals[idx1], tan_vals[idx1])
b2 <- make_block(degrees[idx2], sin_vals[idx2], cos_vals[idx2], tan_vals[idx2])
b3 <- make_block(degrees[idx3], sin_vals[idx3], cos_vals[idx3], tan_vals[idx3])

# Padding 2 κενές γραμμές στο b3 για cbind
pad <- nrow(b1) - nrow(b3)
if (pad > 0) {
  empty <- data.frame(
    deg = rep("", pad), sin = rep("", pad),
    cos = rep("", pad), tan = rep("", pad),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  b3 <- rbind(b3, empty)
}

combined <- cbind(b1, b2, b3)
colnames(combined) <- c(
  "θ","ημ(θ)","συν(θ)","εφ(θ)",
  "θ","ημ(θ)","συν(θ)","εφ(θ)",
  "θ","ημ(θ)","συν(θ)","εφ(θ)"
)

# Γωνίες-κλειδιά για κίτρινο φόντο (0,30,45,60,90)
key_angles <- c(0, 30, 45, 60, 90)
key_rows   <- which(degrees[idx1] %in% key_angles)

# ── πίνακας ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

kbl(
  combined,
  booktabs = TRUE,
  escape   = FALSE,
  align    = rep(c("r","r","r","r"), 3),
  linesep  = "",
  caption  = "Τριγωνομετρικοί αριθμοί ημ(θ), συν(θ), εφ(θ) για 0° – 90°"
) |>
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed","bordered"),
    stripe_color      = "#EBF3FC",
    font_size         = 12,
    full_width        = FALSE,
    position          = "center"
  ) |>
  add_header_above(
    c("0° – 30°"=4, "31° – 61°"=4, "62° – 90°"=4),
    bold=TRUE, color="white", background="#1F4E79"
  ) |>
  column_spec(c(1,5,9),  width="50px", bold=TRUE) |>
  column_spec(c(2,6,10), width="75px") |>
  column_spec(c(3,7,11), width="75px") |>
  column_spec(c(4,8,12), width="75px") |>
  row_spec(key_rows, background="#FFF2CC") |>
  footnote(
    general = c(
      "<span style='color:#1F4E79;font-weight:bold'>■</span> Μπλε σκούρο: 0,00–0,25 &emsp;
       <span style='color:#2E75B6;font-weight:bold'>■</span> Μπλε: 0,25–0,50 &emsp;
       <span style='color:#7030A0;font-weight:bold'>■</span> Μωβ: 0,50–0,75 &emsp;
       <span style='color:#C00000;font-weight:bold'>■</span> Κόκκινο: 0,75–1,00",
      "<span style='color:#CC6600;font-weight:bold'>■</span> Πορτοκαλί (tan): |tan| > 5 &emsp;
       <span style='background:#FFF2CC;padding:1px 6px'>■</span> Κίτρινο: χαρακτηριστικές γωνίες (0°,30°,45°,60°,90°)",
      "Για θ=90° η εφ δεν ορίζεται (—)"
    ),
    general_title="Υπόμνημα:",
    escape=FALSE, footnote_as_chunk=TRUE
  )
```
